overview: A fully-featured web chess game with a built-in AI engine opponent. Play against a friend or challenge the computer at 5 difficulty levels. Features complete chess rules, multiple board themes, timed games, player names, win tracking, and more.
features: Chess engine with 5 difficulty levels (minimax + alpha-beta pruning)
Engine thinking indicator during AI move calculation
Full chess rules: castling, en passant, pawn promotion, check/checkmate/stalemate
5 board color themes with live switching
Game duration selector (3, 5, 10 min or Unlimited)
Countdown clock with end-of-game alert (flash + sound)
Win counter (wins only, no draw points)
Scrollable move history in algebraic notation
Captured pieces display with material advantage
Undo, Resign, Offer Draw, Claim Draw controls
All settings persist across page reloads
